prompt_text:
### Demographics: 78-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Body mass index category: Normal
Major Depressive Disorder
Pancreatic Cancer (post-treatment surveillance)
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 57.5 kg; Height 169.5 cm; BMI 20.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.9%; 9 months ago 8.3%; 6 months ago 7.8%; 3 months ago 7.3%; current 6.3%), FPG (12 months ago 243mg/dL; 9 months ago 208mg/dL; 6 months ago 211mg/dL; 3 months ago 187mg/dL; current 133mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 60.8kg; 9 months ago 59.1kg; 6 months ago 58.1kg; 3 months ago 56.9kg; current 57.5kg), Height (12 months ago 169.5cm; 9 months ago 169.5cm; 6 months ago 169.5cm; 3 months ago 169.5cm; current 169.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 126mmHg; 3 months ago 125mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 75mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 9U/L; 9 months ago 13U/L; 6 months ago 7.0U/L; 3 months ago 6.0U/L; current 12U/L), AST (12 months ago 9U/L; 9 months ago 6U/L; 6 months ago 14U/L; 3 months ago 14U/L; current 11U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; current 36mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 150mg/g; 9 months ago 100mg/g; 6 months ago 92mg/g; 3 months ago 112mg/g; current 96mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 82mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 84mg/dL; 3 months ago 82mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 56mg/dL; 6 months ago 59mg/dL; 3 months ago 58mg/dL; current 57mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 173mg/dL; 9 months ago 153mg/dL; 6 months ago 175mg/dL; 3 months ago 156mg/dL; current 164mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.92 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
